title: Substrate delivery — recipient → server frames
description: Client side of the substrate delivery envelope (CLOACI-S-0012). JSON text frames. The server validates `protocol_version` on `hello` and closes with code 4426 when it doesn't speak the requested version; malformed frames close with 4400.

oneOf.title: hello
oneOf.description: Optional connect-time handshake declaring the client's protocol version. `since_id` is an advisory cursor hint; v1 ignores it (the server resets delivered→pending and replays via the relay).

oneOf.title: ack
oneOf.description: Recipient confirms it has processed row `id`. Idempotent — re-acking an acked or unknown row is a no-op.
